    sorry
  have h₃ : Field51_as_Nat proj.Y % p = (Field51_as_Nat q.Y * Field51_as_Nat q.Z) % p := by
    sorry
  have h₄ : Field51_as_Nat proj.Z % p = (Field51_as_Nat q.Z * Field51_as_Nat q.T) % p := by
    sorry
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃, h₄⟩

      rfl
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [Fin.forall_fin_succ]
      <;>
      norm_num [p] at *
      <;>
      rfl
    })

sorry

    refine' ⟨q.as_projective, _⟩
    simp [as_projective]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try exact by rfl) <;>
    (try simp_all [Result.isOk]) <;>
    (try aesop)
  obtain ⟨proj, hproj⟩ := h₁

  (try simp_all [Field51_as_Nat, CompletedPoint, ProjectivePoint, as_projective, mul_mod, mod_mod]) <;>
  (try

      <;>
      (try ring_nf at *) <;>

      (try simp_all [mul_mod, mod_mod]) <;>
      (try omega)

  (try

  <;>

  <;>

    := by
    simp [Result.isOk]
  refine' ⟨q.as_projective.get (by simp [Result.isOk]), by simp [h₁], _⟩
